Kim Edrian Binasoy

Cloud & DevOps Engineer · QA Automation · AI

I build automated systems that ship faster, test themselves, and learn. Four-plus years across cloud platforms, quality engineering, and AI-assisted automation at Accenture — backed by a full Google Cloud Professional certification trio.

Career

Experience

Accenture — Transportation, Banking & Financial Services.

  1. 2026 — Present Accenture

    AI Automation Engineer

    • Architected an AI-assisted Playwright pipeline that automates high-value regression cases, cutting per-script authoring from 15–30 min to ~5 min (5× faster).
    • Built and optimized CI/CD pipelines to lift team delivery velocity.
  2. 2023 — 2026 Accenture

    Cloud Operations & Quality Automation Engineer

    • Administered 3 Azure environments (test, pre-prod, prod) for a transportation platform; executed and mapped 800+ test cases.
    • Led incident triage and disaster-recovery exercises; authored 10+ operational runbooks.
    • Built an automation tool that cut test-documentation time by 70% and raised testing efficiency by 40%.
    • Shipped an MVP Gen-AI Knowledge Transfer bot to accelerate new-joiner onboarding.
  3. 2022 — 2023 Accenture

    Project Management Officer

    • Owned onboarding / offboarding for a 200+ resource engagement at peak.
    • Built Power Automate / Power Apps tooling that streamlined PMO workflows by 50–75%.
